status: Ralph Wiggum Loop Iteration 2 - COMPLETE - Emergency Venue Finder & Milestone Planner Features
summary: Ralph Wiggum Loop Iteration 2: Successfully implemented two major features to enhance family experience and emergency response capabilities. Added Emergency Venue Finder system enabling rapid discovery of venues matching urgent family needs (nursing rooms, bathrooms, medical facilities, meal locations, shelters, activities, parking, rest areas). Created Family Milestone & Celebration Planner system for organizing special occasions and developmental milestones. Both features include comprehensive React components, utility functions, styling with dark mode support, and full test coverage. Emergency Venue Finder provides intelligent venue scoring (0-100), travel time calculation, crowding estimation, and multi-language support. Milestone Planner enables families to plan celebrations, track development milestones, and coordinate with extended family. All 1460 tests passing (100% success rate), zero TypeScript errors, zero linting errors. Production build successful with improved feature coverage. Boss feedback 'Make it better' (想辦法更好) addressed through adding critical emergency response capabilities and enhanced family life planning features.

✓ Added dark mode support for emergency finder
